title: Alchemical Egypt
subtitle: Alexandria, Panopolis, and the roots of the art

narrative.intro: The tradition's taproot: temple metallurgy, Greco-Egyptian recipe papyri, Zosimos's visions, and the Arabic inheritors. The densest single region in the corpus.
narrative.provenance_note: Region = 'Egypt' (124 events). Events from the ALCHEMYTIMELINEMAP corpus (largely draft-status); locations are event geocodes, not residences. Absence on this map reflects gaps in the record.
narrative.design_note: Lapis & Gold: Egypt is the tradition's sacred deep past; ultramarine and gilt give the taproot its temple-ceiling register.
